mapper.select:
select u.id, u.username, u.name, u.type, u.phone, u.avatar_url, u.additional_info, u.post_id, u.status, p.name as post_name from system_user as u left join system_post as p on u.post_id = p.id and p.is_deleted = 0
u.is_deleted = 0
and u.name like concat('%', #{queryVo.name}, '%')
and u.phone like concat('%', #{queryVo.phone}, '%')
